creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mateusz Piotrowski from comment #10)

The patch applies cleanly, but the resulting sshd binary segfaults when connected to:

    debug1: kex_server_update_ext_info: Sending SSH2_MSG_EXT_INFO [preauth]

    debug1: userauth-request for user mp service ssh-connection method gssapi-with-mic [preauth]

    debug1: attempt 1 failures 0 [preauth]
